violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Sushi sani bucket found at 50ppm Chlorine. *Maintain at 100ppm Chlorine solution.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Hood not currently working. Parts ordered and unit should be fixed within approximately 2 weeks.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Grease/batter residue at cookline equipment, surfaces and handles. -Debris at oven interior. -Heavy batter/grease build up at fryer sides and cart shelves. -Residue at handles/surfaces of cook line equipment, i.e. cold hold doors, refrigerators, microwave, rice hot hold, etc.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Heavy residue at floor edges in sushi prep area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc. …) were not maintained in good repair. -Non-slip tiles added to service areas do not have smooth, cleanable edges. (Recommended deep clean and then to re-grout or use silicone type caucking at edges.)

Control of insects, rodents, and other pests. — --Insects, rodents, or other pests were not controlled in a manner specified in the food service code to minimize their presence within the facility. -Fly strips hanging above stainless table near back prep sink. -"Natural" insect spray kept at dry storage shelf near window.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Server sani bucket found at 50 ppm and Sushi Sani Bucket found at 200ppm Chlorine solutions. *Sani buckets should be maintained at 100ppm chlorine.

Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. -Reusable containers/bowls without handles, used as scoops, left in 2 bulk containers of sugar and dry rice and in bowl of Panko crumbs.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Residue on knife put away at knife magnet. -Splatter at interior surfaces of both microwaves.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Residue at bulk container lids. -Grease residue at cookline equipment, surfaces and handles. -Debris at oven interior. -Heavy batter/grease build up at fryer sides and cart shelves. -Debris/batter in bottom of prep table at cook line. -Debris at edges of cookline prep sink with heavy build up on foil/shelf below prep sink -Residue at handles/surfaces of sushi refrigerator doors.
Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Paper towels were jammed so unavailable at dispenser at hand sink. *Corrected by staff while on-site.
Method, clean, temp, concentration, exposure time, equipment/utensils sanitized (4 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
